arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for QPR with three players unavailable for selection
arts.sum: On listening to the medical staff, Farke said: “They are always worried and give some warnings...and mostly, I ignore them if I am honest and just pick the team! “They, of course, support with some objective data and opinions about the recovery status of players, but in the end, it is my responsibility to take the calls.

arts.ttl: Graeme Souness claims Leeds will be Rangers’ “feeder club”
arts.sum: Leeds United chairman Paraag Marathe is heading up progressing efforts to complete a takeover of Rangers this year, which opens up the question of how the two clubs will co-exist under the 49ers’ stewardship. Whenever there’s a sniff of multi-club ownership, the question then is how that looks when it comes to recruitment, and that is an unclear picture with two very big UK-based clubs such as Leeds and Rangers.

arts.ttl: Leeds interested in striker Ibrahima Kone
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be considering the striker market already ahead of the summer, with links emerging to a striker currently playing in Saudi Arabia. A report from Africa Foot this week has shared that Leeds have their eyes on a move for UD Almeria striker and Mali international Ibrahima Kone.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer notebook - Kalvin Phillips reality amid Manor Solomon comments - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Meanwhile, reports elsewhere had suggested that departing CEO Angus Kinnear is planning to take a number of Leeds backroom staff with him once he moves to Everton at the end of the season. But club insiders have outlined to Leeds Live how his salary would likely be a stumbling block and that United know they will need to make every pound count should they indeed secure promotion back to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Struijk: Leeds not focused on Sheff Utd, Burnley
arts.sum: Centre-back and captain on the night Pascal Struijk was pleased with the win, but insists the focus is going through each game and getting the job done, regardless of what results have helped Leeds elsewhere. Leeds United centre-back Pascal Struijk was delighted to lead the side to another important win last night, but insists that the squad are only focusing on their own results despite what may have happened elsewhere.

arts.ttl: Why Leeds United are 'massive favourites' to pip Sheffield United and Burnley to title
arts.sum: Leeds United play their final match before the March international break tomorrow lunchtime looking to end to their early kick-off hoodoo. They have got teams like Preston, Swansea and Stoke at home.

arts.ttl: Dembele starts: QPR team news and predicted XI to face Leeds United
arts.sum: The latest QPR team news as Marti Cifuentes' side gear up to face Leeds United in the Championship. The post Dembele starts: QPR team news and predicted XI to face Leeds United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Incredible Leeds United feat emerges amid Premier League promotion push
arts.sum: Farke's men ended last season in fourth regarding away performance and this campaign the Whites sit third, having won just eight of their 18 matches on their travels, losing three of them. Leeds United's home record since Daniel Farke arrived at Elland Road has been immense.

arts.ttl: Do Leeds have Raphinha Ballon D’Or clause?
arts.sum: Leeds United sold Raphinha to Barcelona back in the summer of 2022 for a reported £55million, and the Brazilian is looking more likely than ever for the Champions League title and potentially the Ballon D’Or too. Other outlets claim that Leeds could only be in line for as much as £5million in performance-related add-ons such as the Champions League clause, but even then, that nearly gets you two Ao Tanakas .

arts.ttl: Sheffield United star responds to Premier League question after £13m Leeds United transfer snub
arts.sum: Speaking with Dutch outlet Viaplay Sport, Hamer said: “Yeah, yeah, I think so [that I belong in the Premier League]. His swashbuckling performances have earned him rave reviews as the 27-year-old looks to help lead Sheffield United back into the Premier League at the first time of asking.
